elements.name: app-shell
elements.description:
The core layout component for the application.
Handles theme switching, FAB configurations, and navigation slotting.
Uses Material Design 3 tokens and components.
---


### **Slots:**
 - **app-content** - The place for the dynamic application content
- **app-nav** - Where the {@link NavComponent} is placed

slots.name: app-content
slots.description: The place for the dynamic application content

elements.name: blog-post
elements.description:
Represents a published blog record, linking to the artifact
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--blog-post-animation** - The duration of the animation for \`:focus\`, \`:hover\`, \`:focus-within\`, and \`:focus-visible\` states _(default: undefined)_
- **--blog-post-primary-text-color** - The color of the primary text _(default: undefined)_
- **--blog-post-container-color** - The color of the container, {@link MdElevatedCard} and {@link --md-elevated-card-container-color} _(default: undefined)_
- **--blog-post-word-tag-container-color** - The color of the container, {@link WordTag} _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: blogPost
attributes.description: The {@link BlogPostJson} record to render

properties.name: blogPost
properties.description: The {@link BlogPostJson} record to render

elements.name: code-project
elements.description:
Represents a single (usually GitHub-hosted) demonstration project
---

elements.name: configs-dialog
elements.description:
---


### **Events:**
 - ****
- **color_scheme.change** - Dispatched when the UI theme, mode, or contrast is changed.
- **fab.change** - Dispatched when a FAB's position or style is modified.
- **stepUpOpen**

### **Methods:**
 - **hideDialog(): __** - Hides the configuration dialog.
- **showDialog(formContent: _FormContent_): __** - Shows the configuration dialog.

events.name: color_scheme.change
events.description: Dispatched when the UI theme, mode, or contrast is changed.

events.name: fab.change
events.description: Dispatched when a FAB's position or style is modified.

events.description: Dispatched when the UI theme, mode, or contrast is changed.

events.description: Dispatched when a FAB's position or style is modified.

elements.name: connect-dialog
elements.description:
A dialog component that provides various contact methods and social links. It
features collapsible sections for different connection categories.
---


### **Events:**
 - ****

### **Methods:**
 - **hideDialog(): __** - Maps to MdDialog's close method
- **showDialog(): __** - Shows the connect dialog and applies a custom border to the internal container.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--connect-dialog-content-transition** - The animation duration for expanding/collapsing connection details. _(default: 0.3s)_

elements.name: step-up-dialog
elements.description:
---


### **Events:**
 - **stepUpComplete** - Dispatched when the user confirms or cancels the action.

### **Methods:**
 - **showDialog(): __** - Shows the step-up confirmation dialog.

### **Slots:**
 - **actions** - The area of dialog action buttons
- **content** - The body of the {@link MdDialog}
- **headline** - The {@link MdDialog} headline {@link slot}

attributes.description: Determines which {@link StepUpDialogStyle}

elements.name: fab-menu-item
elements.description:
---


### **Methods:**
 - **focus(options: _FocusOptions_)** - Focuses the underlying FAB element.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--fab-menu-item-direction** - The `flex-direction` of the {@link FabMenuItem} _(default: row)_
- **--fab-menu-item-justify** - The Flex `justify-content` of the {@link FabMenuItem} _(default: flex-end)_
- **--fab-menu-item-padding-end** - The logical `padding-inline-end` value _(default: 0)_
- **--fab-menu-item-padding-start** - The logical `padding-inline-start` value _(default: 0)_

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: The icon to display inside the FAB item.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text label displayed next to the FAB item.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: The icon to display inside the FAB item.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The text label displayed next to the FAB item.

elements.name: fab-menu
elements.description:
---


### **Slots:**
 - **menu-items** - The content of the menu, typically {@link FabMenuItem} elements

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--fab-menu-transition-duration** - The duration of the menu's opening and closing animations _(default: 200ms)_
- **--fab-menu-animation-spec** - The animation spec for {@link FabMenu} `transition`s _(default: cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1))_

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The label to display when both opened and closed

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Indicator of open/closed state

attributes.description:
The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

attributes.description: The size of the underlying {@link MdFab}, one of `"small"`, `"medium"`, `"large"`

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The variant, one of `"primary"`, `"secondary"`, `"tertiary"`, `"surface"`

elements.name: nav-component
elements.description:
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--nav-component-icon-animation** - The duration of the icon's fill and color transition. _(default: 225ms)_
- **--nav-component-icon-animation-reduced** - The duration of the icon's transition when motion is reduced. _(default: 1ms)_

attributes.name: header-type
attributes.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

attributes.name: heading-text
attributes.description: The text to display within the header.

properties.name: headerType
properties.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

properties.name: headingText
properties.description: The text to display within the header.

elements.name: word-cloud
elements.description:
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--word-cloud-animation** - Duration of the entrance animation for each word. _(default: 150ms)_
- **--word-cloud-animation-reduced** - Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active. _(default: 1ms)_
- **--word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight). _(default: 1.75rem)_
- **--word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the first weight quartile. _(default: 1.75rem)_
- **--word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the second weight quartile. _(default: 1.5rem)_
- **--word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the second weight quartile. _(default: 1.5rem)_
- **--word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the third weight quartile. _(default: 1.25rem)_
- **--word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the third weight quartile. _(default: 1.25rem)_
- **--word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight). _(default: 1rem)_
- **--word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile. _(default: 1rem)_

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

attributes.name: grouping
attributes.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

attributes.name: instant-clear
attributes.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

attributes.name: sorting
attributes.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

attributes.name: words
attributes.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

properties.name: appearance
properties.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

properties.name: delay
properties.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

properties.name: grouping
properties.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

properties.name: instantClear
properties.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

properties.name: sorting
properties.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

properties.name: threshold
properties.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

properties.name: words
properties.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

elements.name: word-tag
elements.description:
Displays a word in a simple padded box in which the text color and border are synchronised
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--word-tag-color** - The text and border color _(default: --md-sys-color-on-primary-container)_
- **--word-tag-background-color** - The background color _(default: --md-sys-color-primary-container)_
- **--word-tag-font-family** - The font family _(default: --md-ref-typeface-brand)_
- **--word-tag-font-size** - The font size _(default: --md-typescale-body-large-font-size)_
- **--word-tag-font-weight** - The font weight _(default: --md-ref-typeface-weight-regular)_
- **--word-tag-line-height** - The line height _(default: --md-typescale-body-large-lingt-height)_
- **--word-tag-border-radius** - The corner radius (for all corners) _(default: --md-sys-shape-corner-small)_

attributes.name: heaviness
attributes.description: The weight of the tag (text & border), can be `"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or `"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

attributes.name: hrefUrl
attributes.description: A URL which, when provided, wraps this {@link WordTag} in a {@link HTMLAnchorElement}

attributes.name: word
attributes.description: The tagged word

properties.name: heaviness
properties.description: The weight of the tag (text & border), can be `"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or `"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

properties.name: hrefUrl
properties.description: A URL which, when provided, wraps this {@link WordTag} in a {@link HTMLAnchorElement}

properties.name: word
properties.description: The tagged word

elements.name: work-experience
elements.description:
A component for displaying professional work experience entries.  Supports nesting
for sub-roles or specific project assignments under a single employer.
---

attributes.name: date-end
attributes.description: A {@link WorkDate} instance describing employment end date

attributes.name: date-start
attributes.description: A {@link WorkDate} instance describing employment start date

attributes.name: experience-org
attributes.description: The employer formal name

attributes.name: experience-role
attributes.description: The formal role from the {@link WorkExperience} instance

attributes.name: experience-summary
attributes.description: An optional summary of the overall role

attributes.name: is-nested
attributes.description: Whether this is a nested instance

attributes.name: jobs
attributes.description: An array of {@link Job}s rendered as nested {@link WorkExperience} instances

attributes.name: summaries
attributes.description: An array of `{ item: string }` objects describing the responsibilities
